name: Prophet of the Deep End
text:
Whenever Prophet of the Deep End attacks, roll a six-sided die.
1-2 — put two sludge counters on a creature you control.
3-4 — draw a card and you gain 2 life.
5-6 — each opponent sacrifices a creature with the fewest sludge counters among creatures they control. The Prophet warned them. The Prophet always warns them.
flavorText: It stood waist-deep at the public beach, sermonizing to the lifeguards until they, too, understood.
